findings.description: Go template nil pointer on nested .Values access when intermediate key is absent
findings.proposedRule: P76: Always wrap nested Helm value access in {{- with }} or guard each level explicitly

findings.description: Gating env var on plaintext password breaks existingSecret production pattern
findings.proposedRule: P77: Render env var unconditionally for feature mode, not on plaintext value presence

findings.description: POLARIS_URI double-suffix from Helm value already containing /api/catalog
findings.proposedRule: P78: Never append URI path components that may already be in env var

findings.description: Helm unittest notMatchRegex matched explanatory comment containing key name
MinIO requires AWS Sig V4, httpx BasicAuth rejected — used boto3
CWE-312: JDBC password in ConfigMap — moved to Secret with secretKeyRef
